description: Exactly one weekly PR per subsystem (angos-core, angos-ui, website), each covering version updates, security fixes and a full lockfile refresh. lockFileMaintenance is not used: Renovate cannot group it with other update types (it warns and forces a separate branch), so the refresh is done by postUpgradeTasks (cargo update / npm update) running inside each subsystem branch — this requires the self-hosted workflow in .github/workflows/renovate.yaml. Dedicated vulnerability-alert PRs are disabled on purpose: they force their own branch per dependency, so security fixes ride the subsystem PRs instead.

packageRules.description: Core: everything not claimed by a rule below — cargo, Dockerfile, GitHub Actions, etc. cargo update refreshes all transitive deps in Cargo.lock within the same PR (replaces lockFileMaintenance).
UI (SvelteKit): group every dependency under ui/ into one PR, with a full package-lock.json refresh via npm update.
Website (Docusaurus): group every dependency under website/ into one PR, with a full package-lock.json refresh via npm update.
